source_pr.title: select check one column
source_pr.body: row construct is not allowed using directly in select fields, group by, order by, and having.

symptoms: // `select id from t order by row(1, 1)` (rset/rsets/orderby_test.go)
failure_signature: // `select id from t order by row(1, 1)` (rset/rsets/orderby_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: // `select id from t order by row(1, 1)` (rset/rsets/orderby_test.go)

files: plan/plans/select_list.go, rset/rsets/groupby.go, rset/rsets/groupby_test.go, rset/rsets/having.go, rset/rsets/having_test.go, rset/rsets/orderby.go, rset/rsets/orderby_test.go, stmt/stmts/select_test.go
